response.justification: Bogdan has strong technical depth, extensive experience in developer tools (test runners, CI/CD, fluent assertions), and clear leadership in open-source and workshop initiatives, but lacks explicit evidence of people management experience beyond informal mentorship and lacks mobile platform focus, which is a preferred qualification.
strengths: Proven track record in building developer tools (test runners, CI systems, code generators)
Strong open-source contributions and technical mentorship through workshops and talks
Broad technical stack across mobile, web, and systems languages with hands-on DevOps experience
concerns: No clear documentation of formal people management or team leadership responsibilities
Limited evidence of mobile platform expertise despite role focus on mobile ecosystem
Minimal mention of strategic roadmap planning or organizational change leadership
